questions.statement:
<p>&ldquo;The judge&rsquo;s standing in the legal community, though shaken by false allegations of wrongdoing, remained __________.&rdquo;</p>

<p>The word that best fills the blank in the above sentence is :</p>

<p><span style="font-weight: 700;"><u>Directions</u> - A sentence is given in Active/Passive voice. Out of the four alternatives suggested, select the one which best expresses the same sentence in Active/Passive voice.</span></p>

<p>Bases taste&nbsp;bitter.</p>
options: Bases is bitter when they are tasted. /
Bases have been bitter when they are tasted. /
Bases are bitter when they are tasted. /
Bases are bitter when it is tasted. /

questions.statement:
<p>Select the correct indirect form of the given sentence.</p>

<p>Tina said, &quot;My parents are getting divorced.&quot;</p>
options: <span style="">Tina said that her parents are getting divorced.</span> /
<span style="">Tina said that her parents were get divorced.</span> /
<span style="">Tina said that her parents have been getting divorce.</span> /
<span style="">Tina said that her parents were getting divorced.</span> /

questions.statement: What should come in the place of blank number (1)?&nbsp;&nbsp;
What should come in the place of blank number (2)?
What should come in the place of blank number (3)?
What should come in the place of blank number (4)?
What should come in the place of blank number (5)?
